---
name: 🐛 Bug report
about: Report a problem with downloading, transcription, or translation
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened?

A clear description of the problem.

## Command you ran

```
python youtube_downloader.py ...
```

## Output / error

Paste the full console output, especially any error or the script's diagnosis message.

```
(paste here)
```

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. Windows 11)
- Python version: (`python --version`)
- Running on: CPU / GPU (which card?)
- Model used: (e.g. turbo, large-v3)

## For subtitle quality issues

- Video language: 
- `--source-lang` value you used: 
- Did it work better with an explicit language / bigger model?
